upload.title: Upload a file and start the check
upload.description: Upload a CSV or Excel file with the columns hostname, type, value. The application verifies that each hostname resolves, on ALL of its authoritative nameservers, to the expected type and value.
upload.dropText: Drag a file here or click to select it
upload.softLimitNote: Recommended limit: {{count}} records per batch. Larger files are accepted but the check may take longer.
upload.softLimitExceeded: The file exceeds the recommended limit of {{count}} records: the check started anyway but may take longer.

errors.parseFailed: Could not read the file. Check the headers and format.
errors.noValidRows: No valid rows found in the file.
errors.invalidInput: Invalid input. Check hostname, type and value.

singleCheck.title: Single check
singleCheck.description: Quickly test a single record without creating a batch.

rules.title: How verification works
rules.authoritative: Each hostname is queried on ALL authoritative nameservers of its zone.
rules.contains: "Contains" match: the expected value must be present; any extra records raise a warning.
rules.and: "a & b" → requires BOTH values (extra records remain a warning).
rules.or: "a | b" → requires AT LEAST ONE of the values and allows ONLY the listed values (e.g. accepts "a & b" but not "a & c").
rules.operators: The & and | operators must be written with surrounding spaces; they cannot be mixed in the same cell.
rules.cname: CNAME: the value is the canonical target (alias). A name with a CNAME cannot have other records and may point to a chain.
rules.policy: Policy types (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, MTA-STS, TLS-RPT, BIMI): TXT records at conventional names (e.g. DMARC → _dmarc.domain). For DKIM put the full selector name in the hostname (e.g. sel._domainkey.domain).

batch.name: Name
batch.invalidRowsDesc: These rows were skipped during the check.

warning.extraRecordsPresent: Extra records present beyond the expected value

invalid.mixedOperators: The & and | operators cannot be mixed
